top_signals.title: Oil, Gas Tankers Cross Hormuz Via Oman-Side Route After U-Turns
top_signals.summary: Oil and gas shipping along a US-protected corridor in the Strait of Hormuz showed signs of recovering Sunday, a day after a batch of vessels performed unexplained U-turns and detours in the vital energy corridor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nato leaders gather for crucial meeting in Ankara
top_signals.summary: Plus, nominations open in UK’s leadership contest, Iran buries former leader, Shell gives a trading update
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Burnham warned over lack of cabinet as Number 10 transition talks step up
top_signals.summary: Prospective Labour prime minister could take office as soon as July 20
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Accounts for kids launched July 4: What parents need to know
top_signals.summary: Here's a breakdown of how Trump Accounts work, who qualifies for free money and when the funds can be withdrawn.
